meta.title: Hillbilly Dreams 12-Month Forecast
meta.author: Finance Director (Cos sub-agent)
calibration_notes: Inn rows are planning estimates until Tracy pulls trailing 12-month Cloudbeds revenue.
Records and Radio = $0 in Y1 by plan, not by accident.
BMA = $0 in base case; requires capital decision by July 2026.
Recalibrate quarterly. Next recut: end of July 2026.

business_units.name: Big Muddy Inn
business_units.seasonality: spring strong; summer dip; fall peak; holidays strong; Jan dead
business_units.risk: Tracy or Amy burnout (mitigated by ceiling rule + per-event labor)

business_units.name: Chase Pierson Photography
business_units.risk: depends on Chase's outbound time; falls if Chase is heads-down on platform

business_units.name: Big Muddy Touring
business_units.note: Inn room nights generated by touring acts book to Inn line, not here
business_units.ecosystem_multiplier: high — fills Inn, feeds Magazine and Records
business_units.risk: corridor doesn't fill; mitigated by Amy's residency floor

business_units.name: Big Muddy Magazine
business_units.note: real value is Inn booking lift, already counted in Inn row
business_units.risk: monetization pressure distorts voice; cap at 2 sponsored pieces per issue

business_units.name: Big Muddy Records
business_units.note: 12-24 month gestation play. Catalog asset, not a Y1 P&L line.
business_units.risk: distraction risk; if it pulls focus from Touring/MBT, pause

business_units.name: Studio C
business_units.note: Retainer paid by MBT; books here as ecosystem-level revenue. Net-zero at consolidated level.

business_units.name: MBT Platform B2B
lines: Vicki Wolpert (Woodstock RE broker directory pilot)
business_units.swing_factor: Can swing $0 to $40k depending on whether either pilot lands

business_units.name: Big Muddy Acres
business_units.note: Base case = $0 because cap-ex not yet capitalized. Earliest realistic Q4 2026 with outside money by July 2026.
business_units.decision_gate: 2026-07-31 — Chase confirms or kills capital plan

high.label: Everything clicks
high.narrative: Inn 3 weddings + 2 retreats + premium holiday rates. CPP $6.25k/mo (8+ commissions). Touring fills corridor (10+ outside acts). Studio C ~30 hrs/mo overflow. Both MBT pilots sign + a third. BMA Phase 1 partial-opens Q4 with 15 sites.

mid.label: Plans execute on schedule
mid.narrative: Inn at midpoint of honest range. CPP $5k/mo average. Touring $32k (Amy + 6-10 outside acts). Studio C retainer + modest overflow. One MBT pilot signs Q3, second Q4. BMA stays $0.
mid.vs_anchor: between first profit ($250k) and baseline ($330k) — the planning row

low.label: Survival floor
low.narrative: Inn at bottom of honest range ($110k). CPP $3k/mo (Chase pulled into platform). Touring at floor (Amy residency only). Studio C retainer floor only. Both MBT pilots stall pre-contract. BMA $0. Magazine ships one sponsored piece.
low.vs_anchor: below $185k net floor by ~$12k — uncomfortable but not lethal

green.trigger: month total within 20% of mid-scenario row

yellow.trigger: month total 20-35% below mid OR Inn line 25%+ below mid for 2 consecutive months
yellow.action: 30-min Chase + Tracy + Amy call. Adjust next 60 days. Identify which line missed.
examples: October Inn at $11k vs $16k planned (~30% miss on load-bearing carrier)
CPP zero for 2 months in a row (Chase overcommitted to platform)
Studio C overflow surprises by $2k+ on an invoice (bucket discipline broke)

red.trigger: month total 35%+ below mid for 2 consecutive months OR cash on hand below 60 days operating cost (~$22k Inn alone) OR Inn 40%+ drop in any peak month (Oct/Nov/Dec/Mar/Apr)
red.action: same-day call. Cut discretionary spend (Radio + Records first — they generate $0). Pull wedding deposit forward, run flash promo, or pause non-revenue lines.
red.hard_rule: no founder distribution in a Red month — Tracy + Amy + Chase all hold

blue.trigger: month total 25%+ above mid sustained 3+ months
blue.action: recalibrate. Pull next year forward. Decide whether to capitalize BMA Phase 1, hire shows-and-programming role, or accelerate second MBT B2B pilot.

highest_leverage_chase_actions.action: Whole-Inn buyout funnel (Q2-Q3): one PDF, one price, one inquiry-to-booked flow
highest_leverage_chase_actions.note: Single highest-leverage line item in the forecast. 4% of Inn Y1 mid per buyout.

highest_leverage_chase_actions.action: Photography commission outbound — 2 hours/week to RE clients, hospitality clients, editorial pitches
highest_leverage_chase_actions.note: Each commission moves Y1 by 1.7%. Voice + commission-pitch template already exist.

highest_leverage_chase_actions.action: Booking inquiry response time — auto-template + 24-hr SLA on bigmuddytouring.com inquiries
highest_leverage_chase_actions.note: Touring acts that book also stay at the Inn. Double-counts well.

highest_leverage_chase_actions.action: Close one of the two MBT B2B pilots (Vicki or Paul Green) by end of Q3
highest_leverage_chase_actions.note: Either pilot adds $6k-$15k to Y1. Pick the one closer to ready.

highest_leverage_chase_actions.action: Unblock Tracy on Cloudbeds trailing 12-month pull
highest_leverage_chase_actions.y1_total_value: every Inn forecast line becomes evidence-based
highest_leverage_chase_actions.note: Worth more than any single sales action because it makes every subsequent decision evidence-based.

what_changes_this_forecast.trigger: Tracy pulls real Cloudbeds trailing-12-month number
what_changes_this_forecast.effect: Recalibrate Inn rows; entire mid-scenario shifts up or down

what_changes_this_forecast.trigger: Chase confirms or kills BMA capital plan by July 2026
what_changes_this_forecast.effect: If killed, BMA stays $0 in Y1. If pursued, adds $5k-$15k upside in Q4-Apr.

what_changes_this_forecast.trigger: First MBT B2B pilot signs or stalls
what_changes_this_forecast.effect: If signs by Q3, MBT B2B line is real. If stalls past Q3, drop line to $0.
If named, Touring upside grows. If not, Touring stays at $32k mid.

what_changes_this_forecast.trigger: Adverse event (burnout / hurricane / Cloudbeds outage on peak weekend)
what_changes_this_forecast.effect: Insurance + ceiling rule + per-event labor are mitigations. See per-plan risk sections.
